query:
SELECT u.id, u.email, u.role, u.createdAt, u.crmAccess,
       p.uniqueAgentId, p.membershipTier, p.agentStatus
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN agent_crm_profiles p ON p.userId = u.id
WHERE u.email = 'lulusharris@yahoo.com';
